title: Augsburg Tropics

description.text: In this elegant dining room, in the German countryside, in a house surrounded by lush forests and pasture, the seasons never change! It is always warm, welcoming, fresh and friendly.

At night, with a dimmed chandelier and candle light, it also looks wonderful… all the gold details that were carefully painted into the various elements, wink, glow and glimmer and create such a warm, magical atmosphere.

location: Dining Room. Private Home. Augsburg, Germany
